I've used all ultra units. So I understand how it feels. Hardest part is building up standards now that the devs have focused on making limited stronger. 

So try to have 2 at least 2 limited in each team - which seems like you have right now. Ideally 3 in one or two makes it easier.

Hello! I'm new at the game and don't feel particularly competative or having trouble yet but Im curious if people can give me some tips for the future/who to invest in/what teams could be made? I've been doing Caecus-Murphy-Sanga-Faint (I know Nautila would be better than Faint here I just like Faint)
Team recommendations for Sorell?
Should i push for e3 castor? Or grab e0 clem for free at event?

Gmurphy is a great unit to invest for aequor units. Sanga does great dmg when being fed with lots of shield and tentacle (miryam is a good pair for her). Plug in any shield / aliemus / tentacle spam comps.

For ultra, pollux and castor are good pairs (plug in jenkins and winkle)

For chaos, kath, tawil, and halemn are good investments.

Try this simple beginner guide from Kaly. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1VMhNIGy87oUDWXfh6-AHnRXI_N6zBDMEYjqGh7U3omo/edit?usp=drivesdk

My assumptions for some of these are pretty accurate but its nice to have a better direction thank you! There's a few kits ("Few" a lot of kits) I werent super sure on so again many thanks for a direction

If you want him to do everything, you need him E3. Before then he is mainly the sub dps and shielder and someone like Jenkin is your main dps.
After E3, Jenkin turns into the sub-dps and Castor is your main DPS and tank.
